reproducible_artifact: A senior-engineer growth metric: rolling 90-day artifact-density (lines-of-code / story-point, design-doc-pages / problem-solved, rewrite-count / shipped-feature) tracked alongside outcome metrics. The verse's claim (kauśalam shows in artifact-density, not in effort) is operationalized as a measurable, falsifiable signal.
verdict_reason: Reproducible in calibration committee practice. The implication field operationalizes the verse: 'audit your last two sprints for action-density. The senior whose skill is rising produces tighter artifacts.' This is testable across teams with consistent definition of 'tighter'. The counter-example (novel terrain) prevents misuse — the diagnostic only applies to similar-task-class comparisons. The verse's claim is reproducible without metaphysical machinery. Pass.
